title: Fix broken link on static extends reference

features.name: static_queue_foreach_in_class_inheritance
features.description: Code should include a static queue property accessed via foreach loop with index iteration in a class extending another class
features.snippet:
class Parent; int seq[$]; endclass
class Child extends Parent; static int m_typewide_sequences[$]; function void init(); foreach (m_typewide_sequences[i]) seq.push_back(m_typewide_sequences[i]); endfunction endclass

features.name: static_property_index_access_in_foreach
features.description: Code should include a static property indexed by a loop variable inside a foreach iteration
features.snippet: class Cls; static int m_typewide_sequences[$]; function void init(); foreach (m_typewide_sequences[i]) $display("%d", m_typewide_sequences[i]); endfunction endclass

features.name: class_inheritance_static_queue_member
features.description: Code should include a class extending another class where the child declares a static queue member
features.snippet:
class uvm_sequence_library; int sequences[$]; endclass
class Cls1 extends uvm_sequence_library; static int m_typewide_sequences[$]; endclass
